name: Strawberry Strudel
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. In another bowl, whisk together the eggs, melted butter, lemon juice, evaporated milk, sugar, and cinnamon until well combined.
3. Gradually add the liquid mixture to the dry ingredients, stirring until just mixed into a smooth dough.
4. Roll out one portion of the dough on a floured surface into a rectangle about 12 inches long and 6 inches wide.
5. Spread the strawberry jelly evenly over the dough, followed by the chopped apples and nut meats.
6. Fold the dough over the fruit filling, rolling it tightly from the middle to form a log.
7. Cut the log into 2-inch slices.
8. Place the slices in a baking dish and bake for 30 minutes in a hot oven (350°F/175°C).
9. Serve warm with fresh strawberry sauce.
NOTE: This is not considered a Creole dish but having received a prize, it is included.
